subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is no God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily He Who conversed with Moses upon the Mount and Who uttereth speech in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لمکلم موسی فی الطور و الناطق فی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
